description: Create context handoff for transferring implementation to next section/session

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.
Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "handoff"` and any `trackId`, recipient, audience, or scope arguments as structured JSON fields.
Review the returned `track_context`, native message/event state, handoff path, warnings, and review_bundle manifest/path list without inlining large artifacts into model context.
To write the handoff, call `cadre_workflow` again with `workflow: "handoff"`, `execute: true`, and `humanConfirmed: true`.
Summarize the handoff path, recipient or audience, open risks, changed canonical JSON artifacts, generated human projections, and next packet.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
